rowFilter.scheduled_posts.priority.name: priority
rowFilter.scheduled_posts.priority.description: Post priority: 0 = normal, >0 = high priority (processed first)

rowFilter.scheduled_posts.error_code.name: error_code
rowFilter.scheduled_posts.error_code.description: Categorized error code for analytics and recovery

rowFilter.scheduled_posts.repurpose_inde.name: repurpose_index
rowFilter.scheduled_posts.repurpose_inde.description: Order of post in repurpose chain (1-based, e.g. 1 for first of 3)

rowFilter.scheduled_posts.repurpose_tota.name: repurpose_total
rowFilter.scheduled_posts.repurpose_tota.description: Total posts in repurpose chain (e.g. 3 for 1/3, 2/3, 3/3)

rowFilter.scheduled_posts.repurpose_pare.name: repurpose_parent_execution_id
rowFilter.scheduled_posts.repurpose_pare.description: Execution ID of original activity this post was repurposed from

rowFilter.community_ai_platform_tokens.c.name: connected_by_user_id
rowFilter.community_ai_platform_tokens.c.description: User who connected this platform (G2.4). Owner or Company Admin may disconnect.

rowFilter.campaign_execution_state.compl.name: completed_days
rowFilter.campaign_execution_state.compl.description: Array of {week, day} objects for completed days

rowFilter.campaign_execution_state.momen.name: momentum_snapshot
rowFilter.campaign_execution_state.momen.description: Current week momentum_level and psychological_movement for execution layer

rowFilter.seven_days_plan.days.name: days
rowFilter.seven_days_plan.days.description: Array of 7 day objects. Each: day, intro_objective, key_message, supporting_points, platform_content[], cta, best_posting_time, content_format_notes, topic_linkage

rowFilter.weekly_content_refinements.ass.name: assigned_to_user_id
rowFilter.weekly_content_refinements.ass.description: Team member assigned to work on this week

rowFilter.platform_rules.creator_depende.name: creator_dependent
rowFilter.platform_rules.creator_depende.description: When true, content type requires human/creator input. When false, can be AI-automated. NULL = use execution mode inference.

rowFilter.campaign_versions.build_mode.name: build_mode
rowFilter.campaign_versions.build_mode.description: Context injection mode: full_context, focused_context, no_context

rowFilter.campaign_versions.context_scop.name: context_scope
rowFilter.campaign_versions.context_scop.description: Scopes for focused_context: commercial_strategy, marketing_intelligence, campaign_purpose, brand_positioning, competitive_advantages, growth_priorities

rowFilter.campaign_versions.campaign_typ.name: campaign_types
rowFilter.campaign_versions.campaign_typ.description: Allowed: brand_awareness, network_expansion, lead_generation, authority_positioning, engagement_growth, product_promotion

rowFilter.campaign_versions.campaign_wei.name: campaign_weights
rowFilter.campaign_versions.campaign_wei.description: Weights per type, must sum to 100 when types.length > 1

rowFilter.campaign_versions.company_stag.name: company_stage
rowFilter.campaign_versions.company_stag.description: Company stage for baseline computation: early_stage, growth_stage, established

rowFilter.campaign_versions.market_scope.name: market_scope
rowFilter.campaign_versions.market_scope.description: Campaign market scope (required at creation): niche, regional, national, global

rowFilter.campaign_versions.baseline_ove.name: baseline_override
rowFilter.campaign_versions.baseline_ove.description: Optional override: { platform, followers? } to use instead of platform_metrics_snapshots

rowFilter.voice_notes.suggestions.name: suggestions
rowFilter.voice_notes.suggestions.description: AI-generated suggestions based on voice content

rowFilter.social_accounts.company_id.name: company_id
rowFilter.social_accounts.company_id.description: Company context for multi-tenant isolation. New connections must set this.

rowFilter.campaigns.origin_source.name: origin_source
rowFilter.campaigns.origin_source.description: Intelligence source that triggered this campaign: opportunity, trend, strategic_insight, manual

rowFilter.external_api_sources.oauth_cli.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted OAuth Client ID for per-company config

rowFilter.external_api_sources.oauth_cli.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted OAuth Client Secret for per-company config
